title: SPAIN enforcement action against GATIGOS, S.L. (6,000)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 6,000 on GATIGOS, S.L. The controller failed to react to multiple requests by the DPA. Legal basis: Art. 58 (1) GDPR.
dedupKey: spain enforcement action against gatigos s l 6 000|2026-04-28
